senses.gloss: to cause to travel over, pass through, perform
to give in marriage, to marry
middle (of a desert, a camel, the night, etc.)
walnut (the fruit of any Juglans tree; walnut trees are usually شَجَر الْجَوْز (šajar al-jawz); the same tendency in the derived terms)

etymology.text:
جَوْز
Etymology tree
Proto-Iranian *gauz-der.
Middle Persian 𐭢𐭥𐭦 (gōz)bor.
Arabic جوز
Borrowed from Middle Persian 𐭢𐭥𐭦 (gōz, “walnut”).
